name: Detect flood events and classify severity from streamflow data
prompt: Read streamflow.csv (columns: date, station_A, station_B, station_C) and thresholds.json. For each station, determine if any flooding occurred by comparing daily flows to flood stage thresholds. Classify the maximum severity reached (none/action/minor/moderate/major). Count total flood days per station (days where flow exceeds the action threshold). Write flood_report.json with keys: stations (array of {name, max_severity, flood_days, peak_flow, peak_date}).

criteria.description: flood_report.json exists and is valid JSON
Station A: moderate severity with 2 flood days
Station B: no flooding with 0 flood days
Station C: minor severity with 5 flood days
Peak flows are within expected ranges
